subcodes.first_line: ...Your letter was received; but Abdul Baha, owing to the infirmity of the body; the difficulty of voyaging over seas and lands, the lack of rest, the striving and exerting day and night
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
